Silver Dragon Tattoo  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE SHOULDERS ARMS WRIST
AC: 2
STR: +4 WIS: +4
Focus: Mana Preservation II
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Silver Dragon Tattoo
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE SHOULDERS ARMS WRIST
AC: 2
STR: +4 WIS: +4
Focus: Mana Preservation II
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Monk
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-19 03:13:22
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
Nojas Blackfist


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Post Comment
Cool thing
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2011 at 8:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1596990091844
Scholar
39 posts
Wish SoE still made creative items like this, stumbled upon mine while mass killing for faction for white dragon helm quest, really thought it was a near little find.

~Blade Dancer Punk Punkerstein of Drinal
▲ Page top
Question
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2003 at 8:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259605075
2 posts
IUf your wearing 5 of these (face, 2 wrists, arms shouuders) does that mean 50% less mana to cast spells???
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2006 at 6:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863751171
877 posts
A: They're Lore, so you can only have one at a time.
B: Focus Effects of the same type or/and line do not stack. (You'll get the highest of them.)
▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2003 at 5:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1598199386976
361 posts
No
▲ Page top
Not a face only item
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2003 at 12:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570689513
26 posts
This can be worn on your arms, wrists, and back, as well as face.
▲ Page top
MP 3
QuoteReply
# Sep 25 2002 at 5:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255454447
17 posts
yes, it has that effect, and i looted mine, while KoS to giants, so it can drop as well.
▲ Page top
New Effect
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2002 at 2:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255430789
Scholar
47 posts
I heard this now has the effect "Mana Preservation II". Can anyone confirm or deny this? Thanks!
▲ Page top
RE: New Effect
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2002 at 9:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570689513
26 posts
Yes!!!
It does have mana preservation II. Saves me a nice chunck of mana on all spells lvl44 and below.
I recieved one in a Kael Raid several weeks ago. It is an ok piece, but with the mana preservation it is very nice.
I like to wear it on my arm. I wish it had a visual effect that I could see.

Shiffer, furry footed fool of the 55th season
▲ Page top
Can I kill for it?
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 10:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771799395
2 posts
The other link I have for this says I have to quest for it, same site here...https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/quest.html?quest=1101
So...can I kill for it? I don't want to get it by being nice to stinky giants, that is really going to ruin the whole roleplay of getting the thing. I have wrongs to avenge, and giants must die!!! Erm, and stuff.
▲ Page top
I have one
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2001 at 10:29 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361745691
4 posts
I have one of these on the Quellious Server and when you die it is not soulbound.. When I loot my body it defaults to my wrist slot so I have to move it to make room for my Blue Diamond Bracers
▲ Page top
It comes off..
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2001 at 2:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965738974
4 posts
I have one in my arm slot. It's not soul-bound to me (meaning it comes off when I die) and when I loot it back on to my character, it defaults to the wrist slot. I then move it to my arms. You can move this item as you see fit, or not wear it at all. Trust me, I've done this.

Gnormagn Fudder
Cleric of Bertoxxulous - BLOODHORDE!
Terris-Thule Server
▲ Page top
RE: It comes off..
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2002 at 4:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770191902
Scholar
92 posts
who said it couldn't come off?
▲ Page top
RE: It comes off..
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 4:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409089614
64 posts
The two posts immediately below the one you replied to.

And yes, I have had one for quite a while, and it is a completely normal nodrop item, that can be worn in multiple slots.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 04 2001 at 7:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Scary item to mess around with. Personally, I don't think I'd ever wear it. There's always something better out there, and I'm not too thrilled that it won't come off. Plus, I hear the quest to take it of scares that spot so you cannot wear anything else there! nope, not worth it in my book.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 15 2001 at 6:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) BTW you cant take this one off once you put it on so place it wisely.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 05 2001 at 1:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) no, he IS right.. u have to get a dragonblood elixir and right click it to destroy the item off you
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 1:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah right, the game isn't that realistic.
RE: cant get it off.
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 12:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966146901
7 posts
You are right, this post about it not coming off is joke. My druid on Prexus is wearing one of these on her arm. It acts just like any other no drop item. There is nothing odd about it. It's a nice piece that drops in Kael. It is not a quest.

You know, people look to these boards for answers, I wish everyone would respect that and only give legitimate information.
